documentsAndScholarshipChoice.title: Application Process Setup
documentsAndScholarshipChoice.subtitle: Complete your student application process by selecting your status and uploading required documents
documentsAndScholarshipChoice.step1Title: What is your current status in the US?
documentsAndScholarshipChoice.step1Description: Please select your current immigration status to help us provide the best guidance for your application process.
documentsAndScholarshipChoice.firstTimeF1Description: I am outside the US and need an F-1 student visa to study in America.
documentsAndScholarshipChoice.schoolTransferDescription: I am already in the US with an F-1 student visa and want to transfer schools.
documentsAndScholarshipChoice.statusChangeDescription: I am already in the US with another visa (e.g., tourist) and want to change my status to student.
documentsAndScholarshipChoice.step2Description: Upload the required documents for your application.
documentsAndScholarshipChoice.step2Important: IMPORTANT: All documents must be in English. If your documents are in another language, you can request certified translation through our partner Lush America.
documentsAndScholarshipChoice.languageError: This document is not in English. Please provide an English version or certified translation.
documentsAndScholarshipChoice.accessError: Unable to process {{documentType}}. The file may be corrupted or in an unsupported format. Please try uploading a new file.
documentsAndScholarshipChoice.fundsDataError: Unable to validate proof of funds. The document may not contain clear bank balance information or be in an unreadable format. Please try uploading a clearer and more legible bank statement.
documentsAndScholarshipChoice.currencyFieldError: Internal system error processing currency data in {{documentType}}. The document may not contain valid currency information or be in an unsupported format. Please try uploading a clearer document.
documentsAndScholarshipChoice.passportFormatError: The passport document format is not recognized. Please upload a clear, undamaged passport photo.
documentsAndScholarshipChoice.diplomaProcessError: Unable to process High School Diploma. The file may be corrupted or in an unsupported format. Please try uploading a new file.
documentsAndScholarshipChoice.fundsValidationError: Unable to validate document. The file may be corrupted or in an unsupported format. Please try uploading a new file.
documentsAndScholarshipChoice.passportMRZError: The passport document is not readable. Please ensure the passport is clearly visible and the machine-readable zone (MRZ) at the bottom is not damaged or obscured.
documentsAndScholarshipChoice.bankStatementNotReadableError: The bank statement is not readable. Please ensure the document is clearly visible and all text is legible.
documentsAndScholarshipChoice.diplomaNotReadableError: The diploma document is not readable. Please ensure the document is clearly visible and all text is legible.
documentsAndScholarshipChoice.insufficientFundsError: Insufficient funds detected. The minimum required balance is $22,000 USD.
documentsAndScholarshipChoice.diplomaDamagedError: The diploma appears to be damaged or unclear. Please upload a clear, undamaged copy.
documentsAndScholarshipChoice.passportDescription: Upload a clear photo or scan of your passport.
documentsAndScholarshipChoice.diplomaDescription: Upload your high school diploma or equivalent.
documentsAndScholarshipChoice.fundsProofDescription: Upload bank statements or financial documents. A minimum of $22,000 USD is required, plus $5,000 USD for each dependent.
documentsAndScholarshipChoice.dragDropFiles: Drop files or click to select
documentsAndScholarshipChoice.onlyPdfSupported: Only PDF files are supported for multiple documents
documentsAndScholarshipChoice.onlyPdfAllowed: Only PDF files are allowed for proof of funds
documentsAndScholarshipChoice.documentsApprovedDescription: Excellent! Your documents have been approved and you're ready to proceed with the application fee payment.
documentsAndScholarshipChoice.analyzingOverlayDescription: This may take up to 40 seconds. Please do not close this window.
documentsAndScholarshipChoice.manualReviewDescription: Our artificial intelligence was unable to identify all the necessary information in the submitted documents. Don't worry! Your documentation has been sent to our support team to perform a detailed analysis.
documentsAndScholarshipChoice.manualReviewTimeframe: The analysis will be completed within 48 hours and you will receive the results via email.
documentsAndScholarshipChoice.aiProcessingFailed: Our AI was unable to process the documents automatically.
documentsAndScholarshipChoice.teamAnalysisMessage: Don't worry! We've sent them to our team for detailed analysis.
documentsAndScholarshipChoice.smartAssistantDescription: Use the floating button on the corner of the screen to ask questions in real-time.
documentsAndScholarshipChoice.supportChatDescription: Access the team chat right below the 'My Applications' section in the dashboard.

documentsUploadStep.importantNotice: Make sure that the submitted documents are clearly visible and legible. Also make sure that the submitted documents are exclusively in <boldUnderline>English</boldUnderline>, if you don't have the documents translated we recommend the document translation services of our partner <link>Lush America Translations</link>.

items.question: Who is Matrícula Rewards for?
items.answer: Matrícula Rewards is for students who want to turn their referrals into real benefits. For every friend who enrolls using your code, you accumulate MatriculaCoins and decide how to use them: apply as a discount on your tuition or cash out. The more you refer, the more you save or receive.

items.question: How much does it cost to participate in Matrícula Rewards?
items.answer: Nothing. Matrícula Rewards is 100% free. You receive your referral code and can immediately start referring friends who want to study in the USA.

items.question: How do I earn MatriculaCoins?
items.answer: You accumulate coins for every friend who enrolls using your referral code. There is no limit: the more people you refer, the more coins you earn.

items.question: How many coins do I earn per referral?
items.answer: You get 100 MatriculaCoins for every friend who completes their enrollment from your referral.

items.question: When is a referral considered confirmed?
items.answer: The referral is validated when the person who used your code completes the enrollment stage on the platform. After validation, the coins are automatically credited to your account.

items.question: How much is each MatriculaCoin worth?
items.answer: Each coin is equivalent to $1 USD in discounts. You can track your available balance directly on your dashboard.

items.question: How do I redeem my rewards?
items.answer: Directly on your dashboard, you choose what to do with your accumulated coins: apply them as a discount on your tuition or redeem the balance in cash. The choice is always yours.

items.question: How much does it cost to become an affiliate?
items.answer: Nothing. The Matrícula USA affiliate program is 100% free. You create your account, receive your code, and can start referring.

items.question: How do I receive my referral code?
items.answer: As soon as you create your affiliate account, a unique code is automatically generated and made available on your dashboard.

items.question: How many coins do I earn per referral?
items.answer: You accumulate coins for each confirmed referral, with no limit on referrals. The more people you refer, the more coins you earn.

items.question: When is a referral considered confirmed?
items.answer: The referral is validated when the person who used your code completes the required step on the platform. After validation, the coins automatically enter your account.

items.question: How much is each coin worth?
items.answer: Each coin is equivalent to US$ 1. You can track your available balance directly on your affiliate dashboard.

items.question: How do I redeem my rewards?
items.answer: On your dashboard, you can exchange accumulated coins for benefits within the Matrícula USA platform or withdraw the available balance.

howItWorks.title: How does the Affiliate Program work?

step1.title: Share your link
step1.description: Copy your unique referral link and share it on your social networks, websites, or directly with students interested in entering American universities.

step2.title: Track the stages
step2.description: When a student registers, they are linked to you. Commissions are credited to your balance gradually as the student makes fee payments in the process.

step3.title: Withdraw your balance
step3.description: Once you accumulate available balance, you can request a withdrawal via Zelle or Stripe. Our team reviews the request and makes the payment directly to your registered account.
